goal: Scripted: add conveyor USD as a reference at translate (2,0,0) with 90° Z rotation, save.
thoughts: Skip run_usd_script — add_reference + set_attribute is two RPC calls and already covers the case. Use xformOp:translate and xformOp:rotateZ with the modern UsdGeom.XformOp API via set_attribute. Save the stage so it survives a kit restart.
code:
add_reference(
    prim_path="<CONVEYOR_PRIM_PATH>",       # /World/Conveyor_01 (suffix if exists)
    reference_path="<CONVEYOR_USD>"          # /home/raj/downloads/conveyor_v2.usd
)

set_attribute(
    prim_path="<CONVEYOR_PRIM_PATH>",
    attr_name="xformOp:translate",
    value=[2.0, 0.0, 0.0]
)
set_attribute(
    prim_path="<CONVEYOR_PRIM_PATH>",
    attr_name="xformOp:rotateZ",
    value=90.0
)

save_stage(stage_path="<STAGE_USD>")

# If prim path collision: increment suffix _01 → _02 before add_reference.
failure_modes: Using deprecated UsdGeom.Xformable.AddTranslateOp without xformOpOrder update
Path collision — second add_reference overwrites the first silently
Stage not saved — conveyor gone on next kit launch
Rotation axis wrong because conveyor asset has non-standard up-axis
